title: Skill frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter schema for SKILL.md files

name.description: Kebab-case skill name, must match directory name

description.description: One-line description of what the skill does

tags.description: Optional tags for discovery and filtering

tool_agnostic.description: True if the skill body contains no tool-specific syntax or provider references

tested_on.description: Models this skill has been verified on, e.g. ['claude-sonnet-4.6 (2026-05-23)']

deprecated_since.description: Version from which this skill is deprecated. Triggers a validator warning.

superseded_by.description: Name of the skill that replaces this one (kebab-case)
